title: compensation baby Eva Gundam size comparison
display_title: compensation baby Eva Gundam size comparison
wikitext:
[]: compensation baby (Eva/Gundam size comparison)             Quote Post by TheMessiah » Tue Jul 06, 2004 1:42 am i was wondering. partially becuase this was brought up in another Evangelion forum i belong to. which is bigger? Evangelion, or and average gundam

[]:             Quote Post by Asuka Langley » Tue Jul 06, 2004 1:45 am I'm still under the assumption that an Eva is bigger than some gundams. Then again, it depends on the Mobile Suit... and I won't get into Gundam here because it's not the right place for it. Tho, I'm thinking that the Average gundam would be like... just the torso of the Eva. Since Eva's legs are quite long, that is where a lot of their height comes from.

[]:             Quote Post by TheMessiah » Tue Jul 06, 2004 1:46 am exactly, this is alright as per a valid topic because it is Evangelion related

[]:             Quote Post by coff » Tue Jul 06, 2004 2:43 am Is this accurate? http://www.evamonkey.com/randomimages/evaheightcomparison.jpg

[]:             Quote Post by TheMessiah » Tue Jul 06, 2004 2:45 am coff wrote: Is this accurate? http://www.evamonkey.com/randomimages/evaheightcomparison.jpg

[]:             Quote Post by Asuka Loves Toji » Tue Jul 06, 2004 2:58 am yeah i always knew evas towed over gundams its definately implide lol

[]:             Quote Post by EVA-01X » Tue Jul 06, 2004 12:09 pm Hah! Devastator owns all!! That image was soooooooo helpfull when I started writing my fic because of the Universial and AC universes being represented.

[]:             Quote Post by Dave » Tue Jul 06, 2004 1:20 pm Impossible to answer that since the Eva's change size randomly throughout the series. Sometimes they step over buildings, sometimes they have to climb up them. The Eva's range in height from about 200 ft to 600 ft. GAINAX says that they changed the size of the Eva's in certain episodes for dramatic effect.

[]:             Quote Post by sadsadshinji » Tue Jul 06, 2004 3:10 pm no i think its just the buildings...but if you look at the evas...like when Shinji fights the 4th...the eva's head is several stories worth of flesh and armor...and the legs are really long..

[]:             Quote Post by Dave » Tue Jul 06, 2004 6:17 pm It's not just the buildings... the producers said so themselves. They were just too lazy (in my opinion) to do the work required to keep the Eva's at the right size. If you don't believe me go watch episode one, compare unit 01 to the buildings surrounding it. Than go watch episode 16, and watch unit 02 climbing the building. Unit 02 can't be that much smaller than unit 01 can it?

[]:             Quote Post by wildarmsheero » Tue Jul 06, 2004 9:59 pm Well, it's not like Eva is supposed to make sense, right?

[]:             Quote Post by Dave » Tue Jul 06, 2004 10:02 pm It.. kind of makes.. sense.. aw hell I give up. :evil:

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Tue Jul 06, 2004 11:26 pm Yeah.... its a cartoon. And sometimes scale gets skewed. But the Evas are actually really insanely tall. Hell, the length of the entry plug is about 70 feet. I checked using the scale schematics in the NewType collection a couple weeks ago for Asterix's entry plug project.

[]:             Quote Post by sadsadshinji » Thu Jul 08, 2004 3:08 am isnt the entry plug like 30 some feet long? also the battle in ep 1 with unit 01 was at the outskirts... unit 02 was climbing one of the larger buildings closer to the center... that kind of reduces the descrepancy....

[]:             Quote Post by Dave » Thu Jul 08, 2004 1:36 pm Yeah it isn't really that hard to just ignore the times they shrink the eva. It's just something that irks me a lot because I can't really see any need whatsoever to do that...

[]:             Quote Post by phanthompain » Wed Feb 08, 2006 9:16 am If I am not wrong there was once some crossover fight where EVA-01 fights again the gundam wing zero. I bet that in the fight if the scales were drwn more correctly, all EVA-01 had to do was grab hold of the gundam and crush it by the waist. Its probably a sure-kill, the cockpit's at the waist.

[]:             Quote Post by Shnooks » Thu Feb 09, 2006 5:04 pm coff wrote: Is this accurate? http://www.evamonkey.com/randomimages/evaheightcomparison.jpg

[]:             Quote Post by poetic_assassin » Fri Feb 10, 2006 8:50 am Eva has to be.
